name: Hafod Estate & The Cascades
terrain: Woodland paths, steps, some rough stone
highlights: Picturesque 18th-century landscape garden with cascades, grottos and mossy ravines.
points_of_interest: Hafod mansion ruins; Peiran Falls; Mrs Johnes Flower Garden; Cavern Cascade
viewpoints: Gentleman's Walk viewpoints over Ystwyth gorge
parking_start: Hafod Estate car park (free, run by NRW)
food_drink_nearby: Miners Arms Pontrhydygroes; Arch café Cwmystwyth
hazards_notes: Paths steep and root-strewn; some bridges slippery
